summary: Designed GitHub integration module with REST+GraphQL APIs, output formats, and missing profile handling
decisions: REST API for basic metrics (no auth required), GraphQL for contribution calendar (needs token)
Core metrics: repos, contributions, languages, account age, last active, followers
Extended metrics: calendar visualization, streaks, PRs, issues, reviews
Missing profile warning includes interview probe suggestion
Sparse profile (< 5 repos) gets contextual warning about private repos
learnings: GitHub REST API allows 60 req/hour unauthenticated — sufficient for single candidate processing
Language aggregation should weight by repo size, not just count
Contribution calendar can be rendered as emoji grid for markdown compatibility
